resolution_evidence: Status agreement was 21/30 and criterion agreement was 19/30. All disagreements were inspected: C0140, C0168, C0175, C0180, and C0198 were included/include-relevant versus boundary/boundary; C0088 and C0147 were boundary/boundary versus excluded/exclude-insufficient-detail; C0183 was boundary/boundary versus excluded/exclude-out-of-scope; C0136 was included/include-relevant versus excluded/exclude-insufficient-detail; C0061 was excluded/exclude-out-of-scope versus excluded/exclude-insufficient-detail; and C0187 was excluded/exclude-out-of-scope versus excluded/exclude-appearance-dynamics. The five inclusion-boundary records and two boundary-insufficient-detail records establish systematic ambiguity. C0061, C0136, C0183, and C0187 are singleton disagreement types and do not independently establish recurrence. Status agreement is below 0.80 and systematic ambiguity is true, so substantive revision and fresh blind calibration are required before any main release.
